alt: Sea otter floating on its back in calm water
caption: Sea otters float on their backs and spend much of life near the coast.
acquisitionNotes: Manually curated otter hero image with verified sea otter identification. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/f/f8/Sea-otter-morro-bay_13.jpg
